data.name: Bartending Master
data.detailed_description:
Dive into the life of Ryan, burdened with a massive debt due to his ex-girlfriend's betrayal, who stumbles upon a generous repayment contract from an unexpected encounter with underworld figures. His mission: to become a bartender at the "Night Orchid" bar. Here, he meets the stunning and enigmatic owner, Eirina, and embarks on a journey filled with intrigue and personal discovery.

As a bartender with underworld ties, skillful mixology is just the start. Winning over the bar's mistress and generous female patrons through charm and expertise is key to earning and uncovering the truth behind his ex's betrayal.

Characters







Gameplay:

Manage a bar to earn enough money to repay debts.
Chat with customers and romance female characters.
Rich storyline.
Multiple endings.

data.short_description: Dive into the life of Ryan, burdened with a massive debt due to his ex-girlfriend's betrayal, who stumbles upon a generous repayment contract from an unexpected encounter with underworld figures. His mission: to become a bartender at the "Night Orchid" bar.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
